reference: Perform an ultrasound of the abdomen and a full blood count for Helicobacter pylori infection. Also, conduct a chest X-ray and an electrocardiogram. You should take omeprazole forty milligrams once a day before breakfast.
text: Perform an ultrasound of the abdomen and a full blood count for Helicobacter pylori infection. Also, conduct a chest X-ray and an electrocardiogram. You should take Metronidazole 40 milligrams once a day before breakfast.
